description: A company needs to book a conference room for a half-day meeting for 10 people.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of conference rooms that can accommodate 10 people.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available conference room for the requested date and time.

nodes.task_description: Provide the client with the half-day rental rate and any available add-ons (e.g., coffee service, projector).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives a clear quote for the room and optional services.

nodes.task_description: Create a booking for the conference room and send a confirmation to the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the room and provides a confirmation.
